__comment: Token Foundry — cross-tenant usage/cost/TPM dashboard. Import into Managed Grafana with Log Analytics + App Insights data sources. This is a minimal seed; expand panels in Phase 3.
title: Token Foundry — Usage & Cost

targets.query: customMetrics | where name == 'llm-total-tokens' | extend tenant = tostring(customDimensions['tenant']) | summarize tokens = sum(value) by tenant
customMetrics | where name == 'llm-total-tokens' | extend route = tostring(customDimensions['route']) | summarize tokens = sum(value) by route
customMetrics | where name == 'llm-total-tokens' | summarize tokens = sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 1m)
